author_identification.canonical_name_ar: عبد الرحمن بن يحيى المُعَلِّمي اليماني
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Prominent hadith scholar and critic known for his contributions to hadith methodology and creed.
author_identification.methodological_stance: Critical and analytical approach to hadith and creed, emphasizing textual evidence and rational scrutiny.

scholarly_context.tradition_position: A concise treatise on the methodology of seeking truth, particularly in matters of creed and hadith.
scholarly_context.historical_significance: Part of the broader collection of the author's works, highlighting his methodological rigor and spiritual advice for seekers of truth.
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: Muhammad Ajmal al-Islahi is a respected scholar and editor known for his careful and methodical approach to textual investigation.
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The edition appears to be based on a careful review of available manuscripts and includes annotations to clarify the text.
